title: Coerce Object to String
cap_description: Convert a record/object to its string representation
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a record (object) to its string representation. Use this when a downstream cap requires text but the upstream produces a structured record.

## Inputs

A record value (media type `media:record`).

## Outputs

A string representation of the record.

## Notes

- The output format is typically JSON or a similar serialized form.
- For wrapping a string in a record (the reverse), use [Coerce String to Object](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in=media:textable;op=coerce;out=media:record).
- For human-readable text output from a record, a format conversion cap (JSON-to-YAML, etc.) may produce better output than this coerce.
